message:
test(orchestrator): add speaker constraints integration tests (bd-3g8)

Add 165 lines of speaker constraint tests to the orchestrator module:
- resolve_speaker_target_none_when_no_constraints
- resolve_speaker_target_uses_num_speakers (prefers exact count)
- resolve_speaker_target_falls_back_to_max_speakers
- Additional edge case tests for speaker resolution logic
- Tests validate the SpeakerConstraints priority chain used
  during diarization pipeline setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
